sentence: This Privacy Policy (“Policy”) states that The Sick Rose AR Application (“Application” or “we”) would not collect, process and use your personal information. This Policy also sets for the Developer information and Privacy point of contact.
Our Application are not offered directly to a minor. If you are a minor, we recommend that you read this Policy carefully with your parents or guardians, and use our Services with their consent.

NOTE: Your wireless operator, mobile operating system provider and third-party applications, toolbars, services, “plug-ins”, social media platforms and websites may collect, use and share information about you and your device and your usage. This Policy do not cover any website, application, product and service from a third party. We does not control how a third party collects, uses or secures your data. For information about third-party privacy practices, please check their privacy policies.
The types of personal and sensitive user data our Application accesses, collects, uses, and shares; any parties with which any personal or sensitive user data is shared.
When you use our Application, including the feature of recording video, taking photos, and recording audio, we don’t access, collect, use, and share any personal or sensitive user data.
Secure data handling procedures for personal and sensitive user data; and the developer’s data retention and deletion policy.
When you use our Application, we don’t access, collect, use, and share any personal or sensitive user data.

You may contact us at the email address or address as stated below: We will update this Policy from time to time in response to changing laws or operational requirements. If we do make changes, we will post the latest version of this Policy on this page and Application, and indicate the date on which the Policy was last updated. We encourage you to review this Policy periodically to know the latest information of our privacy practice. Your continued access to or use of our Services following the posting of revised terms means that you accept and agree to all changes and the latest version of this Policy.
